item.description:
## Recappi Mini v1.0.108 — CoreAudio recording capture

### Fixes
- Replaces the default system-audio recording path with a CoreAudio process tap instead of ScreenCaptureKit.
- Reduces the WindowServer/coreaudiod load that could make macOS feel lower-FPS while recording.
- Avoids the old ScreenCaptureKit-driven permission prompt loop during recording.
- Captures broad system audio while excluding Recappi Mini itself, so meeting apps with helper processes are less likely to go silent mid-call.

### Validation
- `swift test`: 250 tests, 1 explicit local probe skipped by default, 0 failures.
- `./scripts/build-app.sh`: passed.
- Local CoreAudio tap probe captured real system playback and wrote a non-empty CAF file.
- Local CPU samples no longer showed the previous ScreenCaptureKit-style WindowServer spike.
